summary: The diff implements a comprehensive student placement portal system replacing the health recommendation system. All core requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-6) are implemented with backend data models, frontend UI components, student dashboard, job application flow, admin panel, profile management, and professional UI theme. However, some acceptance criteria are partially implemented or have limitations noted in comments.

missing_requirements.requirement: Students can filter jobs by company, CTC range, or eligibility
missing_requirements.reason: The StudentDashboard page shows job listings but does not implement filtering controls for company, CTC range, or eligibility. Only eligibility-based filtering is done automatically in useStudentDashboard hook.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin interface shows list of all applications grouped by job with student details
missing_requirements.reason: ApplicationManagement.tsx displays job listings but includes an alert stating 'Application management view is available. To see all applications, students must apply to jobs first.' The backend lacks a method to fetch all applications across all students for admin view.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin can view student profiles and filter by eligibility for specific jobs
missing_requirements.reason: The admin panel does not provide functionality to view all student profiles or filter students by eligibility for specific jobs. Only company and job posting management are implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Students can create their profile with name, enrollment number, branch, year, CGPA, skills array, and resume URL
missing_requirements.reason: The backend StudentProfile type and profile creation functions do not include 'enrollment number' or 'year' fields. Only name, email, CGPA, branches, skills, resumeLink, and bio are stored.
